Mara asked for a one-screen annual readout for leadership.

What she cares about:
- actual 2025 revenue after discounts and refunds
- the biggest month
- the quarter where momentum improved the fastest versus the prior quarter
- the product categories that explain most of the year
- the strongest company reporting region, using the city mapping file

Things she does not want in the visual: order-count bragging, unit-volume rankings, gross-revenue totals, test rows, cancelled/returned orders, forecasts, subtotals, or old 2024 closeout activity.

Side note for design only: keep it executive-friendly, with one short sentence explaining the main trend. The planning team also mentioned a possible forecast refresh, but that is not part of this actuals summary.
